## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] `docs/` folder not included
- [ ] Conventional commit message used
- [ ] CI checks pass (backend pytest + import, frontend lint/build, docker)
- [ ] Copilot review **optional** — request only for non-trivial changes (Reviewers → Copilot)

## Copilot review (optional)

Request Copilot when you want a second pass on auth, pipeline, or scraper changes. Skip when CI is green and you ran local `pytest` / lint yourself — saves Copilot premium requests.

1. Open the PR on GitHub
2. Click **Reviewers** → select **Copilot** (if needed)
3. Address any feedback before merging

Copilot uses instructions from `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and `.github/instructions/`.
